prompt: Find degraded dependencies during 3am spike for orders-api in Application Insights

assertions.text: Output includes standard .kql comment header block with Service: App Insights
Uses the dependencies table as primary data source
Groups results by dependency type (SQL, HTTP, etc.) and/or target
Shows duration metrics (avg, p95, or max) to quantify degradation
Uses timestamp column (not TimeGenerated) for App Insights tables
